name: quicksketch
description: Task runner per lo sviluppo di QuickSketch (back-end + front-end)

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run backend" "npm run frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:up && npm --prefix backend run prisma:migrate && npm run seed
